_meta.purpose: Per-provider trust-tier signal consumed by Interpretación de Expertos retriever (interpretacion/retriever_supabase.py) to break ties inside crowded article-anchor sets. The retriever scores chunks as base * (1.0 + ref_boost·hits) * (1.0 + tier_weight·tier_bonus) where tier_bonus ∈ {high:2.0, medium:1.0, low:0.0}.
_meta.matching: Case-insensitive substring match against documents.authority AND each entry of documents.provider_labels. First-match wins in scan order: high → medium → low. Unmatched providers default to 'medium' (preserves pre-11A behavior).
_meta.review_cadence: Operator review monthly via scripts/diagnostics/probe_v11_trust_tier_coverage.py — lists unique documents.authority values not in this allowlist.
